description.ko: 시간이 팽창하고 빛이 심연의 공허라는 절대적인 위엄에 삼켜지는, 우주의 고요한 심장부로 떠나는 몰입형 여정입니다.
description.en: An immersive journey into the silent heart of the universe, where time dilates and light is consumed by the absolute majesty of the abyssal void.

prompt: Cinematic ultra-wide shot of the cosmic abyss, a massive supermassive black hole at the center with a glowing violet and gold accretion disk, distant dying stars flickering in the pitch-black void, ethereal cosmic dust floating in the foreground, highly detailed, 8k resolution, photorealistic, hauntingly beautiful atmosphere.
